canonical_definition: Across the surveyed literature, discourse understanding is framed in several related ways, generally centering on the ability to comprehend relationships between parts of a text. One common definition presents it as understanding how a text is organized and how its components contribute to overall coherence, with one paper applying this to the comprehension of "argumentative flow" in writing. A more model-centric perspective defines it as a latent ability to infer and generate coherent continuations by processing "discourse relations signaled by connectives," with research investigating how internal "discursive circuits" manage this process. A third, specialized framing appears in the context of multi-turn conversations, where it is described as the ability to comprehend and use the "reply dependency structure" for better semantic interpretation. To this end, one paper proposes a "Graph-Centric Dialogue Structuring strategy" to represent these dialogue relationships. While the specific focus varies from general text organization to connective-based relations and dialogue dependencies, the core concept across these definitions is the processing of structural and semantic links within a text.
papers: Exploring the Impact of Personality Traits onLLMBias and Toxicity
Large Language Models Discriminate Against Speakers ofGerman Dialects
Stronger Baselines for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Long-Context Language Models

definitions.text: The ability to understand how a text is organized and how its parts contribute to overall meaning and coherence.
definitions.paper: Large Language Models Discriminate Against Speakers ofGerman Dialects

definitions.text: The latent ability of a language model to infer and generate coherent continuations based on discourse relations signaled by connectives, integrating context and relational semantics across argument spans.
definitions.paper: Stronger Baselines for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Long-Context Language Models

definitions.text: The latent ability to comprehend and utilize the reply dependency structure in multi-turn dialogues for improved semantic interpretation and information extraction.
definitions.paper: Exploring the Impact of Personality Traits onLLMBias and Toxicity
